item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Loved the line “ Notably, as a subject continues to rely on SCP-4653-1 as their only source of nutrition, their opinion of its taste will become more positive over time.”

I think some more context around the first addenda would be good, it’s odd going in cold to an internal Foundation communique like that. A line or two saying “dr whatever has been removed from their post due to misconduct” would go a long way towards helping that first email gel with the rest of the article.

I didn’t think I would like this after the first note but it subverted my expectations and the despair of an omnipotent being is well done. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Ah…..
Foundation kills Greek gods by keeping away nectar. I especially like how everything unfolds (is Zeus here but another immortal who got sortof immortal on lots of nectar)

Not exactly sure what the last message is supposed to be about:

Cold not Cruel?

a Critique of "Cold, not Cruel"?

"Cold, not Cruel" and also very Arrogant and very Stupid?

Or is it just Damage Control?

Or…

have the Foundation accidentally removed an important aspect of this part of the Universe?

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I was a bit wary early on, what with it literally being letters from Zeus. But the way you depicted a god's decent into hopelessness and despair was really good; I especially love the very last letter. Definite Upvote.

item.title: Aphids' Ambrosia
item.content:encoded:
Hello all!
This is my first SCP, created for the 144 Hour Jam Contest of 2020, Part II: "Delicious".

+ Thanks
- Thanks

Thank you to everyone who helped me with comments and critique! Most was in chat, so I don't, ah, actually know most people's Wikidot usernames, but DianaBerry, MalyceGraves, and DrUnoriginal all provided in-depth and helpful criticism that definitely improved the final result.

+ Attribution
- Attribution

The picture used in this article can be found here: https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Blattlaus_mit_Honigtau_6644.jpg . Its creator has licensed it with the proviso that I attribute it (which I am, right now) and indicate if I have made changes (which I have not).

In addition, the email template is pulled pretty straight from the SCP Style Resource.

+ Previous Draft
- Previous Draft

When I first claimed this number, the following draft was saved.

[[module Rate]]


[[include component:image-block name=https://picturearchive.gunauction.com/4894134305/9461684/urx%20001.jpg_thumbnail1.jpg|caption=SCP-5041.|width=300px]]

Item #: SCP-4653

Object Class: Safe

Special Containment Procedures: SCP-4653 is contained in a r
Description: SCP-4653 is a ████-brand Browning Buckmark pistol using ██████-brand hollow point .22lr bullets. It is mostly black and grey, but has a gold trigger. It has strage propitres causing anyone near to pick up SCP-4653 and shoot anyone nearby. It can also casuse anyone nearby to

Addendum: [Optional additional paragraphs]

Thanks for reading!
